original_query: select count(*) from ((select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from store_sales, date_dim, customer        where store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11          and ss_list_price between 271 and 300          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947          and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from catalog_sales, date_dim, customer        where catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11          and cs_list_price between 271 and 300          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947          and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from web_sales, date_dim, customer        where web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11          and ws_list_price between 271 and 300          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947          and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27          ) ) cool_cust ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date
    FROM store_sales, date_dim, customer
    WHERE store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
      AND store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
      AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192 + 11
      AND ss_list_price BETWEEN 271 AND 300
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27

    EXCEPT

    SELECT DISTINCT c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date
    FROM catalog_sales, date_dim, customer
    WHERE catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
      AND catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
      AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192 + 11
      AND cs_list_price BETWEEN 271 AND 300
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947
      AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27

    EXCEPT

    SELECT DISTINCT c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date
    FROM web_sales, date_dim, customer
    WHERE web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
      AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
      AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192 + 11
      AND ws_list_price BETWEEN 271 AND 300
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947
      AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27
) AS cool_cust;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Combine the two EXCEPT operations into one by using a UNION ALL of the catalog and web sales subqueries. This reduces the number of set operations from two to one, potentially improving efficiency.
Replace comma joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and query optimization.
Replace the expression '1192+11' with the constant '1203' for better readability.
